markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 701. Cnty. Traffic Officers
##### § 701.006 — Dismissal

The commissioners court on its own initiative, or on recommendation of the sheriff, may dismiss a county traffic officer if the officer is no longer needed or if the officer’s service is unsatisfactory.

*Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 471 (S.B.376), Sec. 1, eff. June 19, 2009.*

subsections.text: The commissioners court on its own initiative, or on recommendation of the sheriff, may dismiss a county traffic officer if the officer is no longer needed or if the officer’s service is unsatisfactory.
